title: Jujutsucraft Improve
description: A packet to improve some of the features of jujutsucraft.
body:
*This is a accessory mod of jujutsucraft.

Functionality that has been implemented so far.

  1.Restores the size of full power blue and purple in animation.

  2.Created an animation where blue and purple grow in size.

  3.Enhanced unlimit purple, so that it can cause high frequency damage.

  4.Made red can cause a huge explosion shock wave.

  5.special grade cursed spirit can restore health as in anime.

  6.Fixed a bug where domain expansion didn't work on some mobs.

  7.The Malevolent Shrine can now deal high-frequency damage

  8.sukuna_body_chestplate and mahoraga_wheel_helmet are no longer decorations, they can strengthen wearing their mobs.

  9.Mahoraga's ability to adapt is stronger, and now he will get stronger and bigger over time.

  10.Let sukuna and jogo's methods burn mobs.

  11.Made anyone with sukuna_effect use cleave.

  12.Made anyone with infinity_effect use Gravity rolling.

  13.Made Toji and Maki can automatically parry.
  
  14.The Infinity Void can make mobs demented for a while.

  15.Six Eyes now can reduces spell cooldown.

  16.Black hole now can make 99% of mobs disappear instantly.
